tasks.subject: Task 1: Add aria2c seams to downloader.py (no behavior change)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Introduce the two new type aliases, the `_ARIA2_BASE_ARGS` constant, the `_shutil_which_aria2` and `_subprocess_run_aria2` default seams, and the module logger. `download_one` and `download_all` signatures are untouched in this task — this is a pure additive task that locks the public symbols.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/downloader.py`
- Modify: `tests/core/test_downloader.py` (one new test that imports the new symbols)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- import of WhichCallable + RunAriaCallable + _shutil_which_aria2 + _subprocess_run_aria2 succeeds
- _shutil_which_aria2 returns None or path string per shutil.which
- _subprocess_run_aria2 raises KinoforgeError on bad URL
- DEFERRED comment block at lines 10-13 removed
- suite size 1036 -> 1037

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_downloader.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/downloader.py", "tests/core/test_downloader.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_downloader.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["import of WhichCallable + RunAriaCallable + _shutil_which_aria2 + _subprocess_run_aria2 succeeds", "_shutil_which_aria2 returns None or path string per shutil.which", "_subprocess_run_aria2 raises KinoforgeError on bad URL", "DEFERRED comment block at lines 10-13 removed", "suite size 1036 -> 1037"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire aria2c success path into download_one
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `which_aria2` and `run_aria2` kwargs to `download_one`; insert the transport branch between the skip-path and the verify-path. In this task, an aria2c subprocess failure propagates as `KinoforgeError` — the silent stdlib fallback is added in T3.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/downloader.py`
- Modify: `tests/core/test_downloader.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- A1 aria2c used when detected, no stdlib fetch
- A2 aria2c skipped when which returns None
- A5 sha256 mismatch raises, part deleted, target absent
- A6 sha None branch + idempotent skip on second call
- 8 existing download_one ACs pass with which_aria2=_DISABLED_ARIA

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_downloader.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/downloader.py", "tests/core/test_downloader.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_downloader.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["A1 aria2c used when detected, no stdlib fetch", "A2 aria2c skipped when which returns None", "A5 sha256 mismatch raises, part deleted, target absent", "A6 sha None branch + idempotent skip on second call", "8 existing download_one ACs pass with which_aria2=_DISABLED_ARIA"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Silent stdlib fallback on aria2c failure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap the aria2c call in `try/except KinoforgeError`; on failure log a `WARNING`, unlink the `.part`, and fall through to the stdlib branch with `Range` semantics intact.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/downloader.py`
- Modify: `tests/core/test_downloader.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- A3 aria2c failure logs WARNING containing aria2c+fallback and stdlib produces file
- A4 poisoned part is unlinked before fallback; no Range header on retry; correct bytes

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_downloader.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/downloader.py", "tests/core/test_downloader.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_downloader.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["A3 aria2c failure logs WARNING containing aria2c+fallback and stdlib produces file", "A4 poisoned part is unlinked before fallback; no Range header on retry; correct bytes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Forward seams through download_all + A7
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `which_aria2` and `run_aria2` kwargs to `download_all` with the same defaults, forward them to every `pool.submit(download_one, …)` call, retrofit the existing `download_all` test, and add A7.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/downloader.py`
- Modify: `tests/core/test_downloader.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- A7 download_all forwards seams; run_aria2 called once per artifact; stdlib fetch never called
- existing test_download_all_concurrent passes with which_aria2=_DISABLED_ARIA

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_downloader.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/downloader.py", "tests/core/test_downloader.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_downloader.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["A7 download_all forwards seams; run_aria2 called once per artifact; stdlib fetch never called", "existing test_download_all_concurrent passes with which_aria2=_DISABLED_ARIA"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: README + PROGRESS docs (Phase 29)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a 'Faster downloads (aria2c)' sub-section to README.md and a 'Phase 29 — aria2c fast-path' entry to PROGRESS.md per the established convention.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md`
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- README sub-section names aria2c + install commands + silent fallback
- PROGRESS Phase 29 entry with all 5 task SHAs backfilled
- GitHub issues table row #9 flipped to CLOSED (Phase 29)
- source-audit + examples gates pass

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_source_audit.py tests/test_examples.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_source_audit.py tests/test_examples.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README sub-section names aria2c + install commands + silent fallback", "PROGRESS Phase 29 entry with all 5 task SHAs backfilled", "GitHub issues table row #9 flipped to CLOSED (Phase 29)", "source-audit + examples gates pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Whole-suite gate + push to origin/main
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run the full test suite, confirm 1044 passing, then push the Phase 29 commits to `origin/main` per the established direct-to-main pattern.

**Files:** None (gate + push only).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- pixi run test exits 0 with 1044 passed
- pixi run pre-commit run --all-files passes
- git push origin main succeeds
- working tree clean post-push

**Verify:** `pixi run test`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pixi run test exits 0 with 1044 passed", "pixi run pre-commit run --all-files passes", "git push origin main succeeds", "working tree clean post-push"]}
```
